title: Adding a constantly updated Excel Spreadsheet as a link
excerpt: We use an excel spreadsheet that is saved on a shared company drive to track certain parameters in my job and I would like to link to it on Monday. Every method I try seems to force the user to download the spreadsheet d…

posts.author: jpuff (Jeffrey Puffenberger)
posts.cookedHtml: We use an excel spreadsheet that is saved on a shared company drive to track certain parameters in my job and I would like to link to it on Monday. Every method I try seems to force the user to download the spreadsheet despite it being on a shared drive. It is constantly updated and it would be a hassle to have to re-upload it to the project on Monday every time it is updated. Is there a way to link to it directly? Thank you.

posts.author: Emily (Emily Temkin)
posts.cookedHtml: I’m afraid there isn’t currently a way to have your excel spreadsheet auto-update your monday.com board. However, we can create a live sync to sync your monday.com boards to excel - would this help?

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Emily

See also topic Best way to connect powerbi to Monday. When we have a possibility to use monday.com as data source in Excel we also have a live connection.

posts.author: aperegrine (Adam Peregrine)
posts.cookedHtml: yes, this would help me too, how is it done?

posts.author: AlejandraGelfi (Alejandra Gelfi)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @Emily, this would be super useful for us too. Is it being developed? Thanks!
